summary: SIDE_BY_SIDE rank-deficient map example. First, a PURPLE null-space vector n is mapped to the zero output, establishing An=0. Then a YELLOW input x is extended by the same null-space vector to form the different ORANGE input x+n. Copies of x and x+n map to the same output point because A(x+n)=Ax+An=Ax. The final beat uses ValueTracker-driven YELLOW input/output arrows to show x changing while Ax moves along the TEAL column-space line.
